tests.title: Execute the CLI agentic loop for the Jungle project and verify the terminal output
tests.objective: Execute the CLI agentic loop for the Jungle project and verify the terminal output.

versions.objective: Execute the CLI agentic loop for the Jungle project and verify the terminal output.
versions.notes:
locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for locator('#terminal-output').first() to be visible[22m

plan.objective: Execute the CLI agentic loop for the Jungle project and verify the terminal output.
plan.rationale: The execution of the CLI agentic loop is essential for testing the functionality of the Jungle application in a terminal-only environment. This plan ensures that the application is running, the terminal is accessible, and the expected output is verified.

app_bootstrap.reason: The Jungle application needs to be started to execute the CLI agentic loop.

assertions: The terminal output is visible after executing the CLI loop.
The terminal input field is accessible for command entry.
success_criteria: The Jungle application starts successfully without errors.
The CLI agentic loop executes and produces output in the terminal.
Screenshots of the terminal output are captured successfully.

runs.summary:
locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded.

tests.title: Execute the CLI Codex feedback loop using Playwright to verify the Jungle application functional
tests.objective: Execute the CLI Codex feedback loop using Playwright to verify the Jungle application functionality.

versions.objective: Execute the CLI Codex feedback loop using Playwright to verify the Jungle application functionality.
versions.notes:
locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for locator('#session-status').first() to be visible[22m

plan.objective: Execute the CLI Codex feedback loop using Playwright to verify the Jungle application functionality.
plan.rationale: The execution plan aims to automate the testing of the Jungle application in a terminal-only environment, ensuring that the CLI interactions function correctly without requiring UI interactions. This is crucial for validating the feedback loop process in the CLI context.

app_bootstrap.reason: The Jungle application needs to be started to perform the testing.

assertions: The session status is visible and indicates that the terminal is ready.
The CLI loop command executes without errors.
success_criteria: The Jungle application starts successfully and is accessible at the target URL.
The terminal input is filled correctly and the command executes as expected.
Screenshots are captured at the appropriate stages of the execution.

runs.summary:
locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded.
